name: PlayAudioOrMusic
reason: Handler reads one audio/control byte and advances one extra stream byte; that skipped byte is inline control/padding, not a new opcode.

name: SetCCObjectParam6
reason: Handler uses one state/mask byte plus a 16-bit timer/value; previous model swallowed the next command byte.

name: SetCCObjectParam7
reason: Same slot-state/timer pattern as $39; previous model swallowed the next command byte.

name: DropItemAnimation
reason: Handler only advances past the opcode and sets player_action=$0005; following byte is the next EventCmd.

name: SetCCObjectParam9
reason: Handler reads a 16-bit visual/state pointer into slot+$33; there is no third mode byte.
